message:
fix(render): guard against grapheme pool double-free and repack GraphemeId bit layout

Two related render subsystem fixes:

GraphemeId bit repacking:
- Width field shrinks from 7 bits (max 127) to 4 bits (max 15) at bits 27-30
- Generation field grows from 8 bits (max 255) to 11 bits (max 2047) at bits 16-26
- Tab characters normalized to space in CellContent::from_char() to prevent
  cursor desynchronization

Double-free guard in GraphemePool:
- Generation counter type widens from Vec<u8> to Vec<u16> for 11-bit generation
- release() now detects double-free via refcount==0 check with debug_assert
  and early return instead of saturating_sub(1) which silently corrupted the
  free list

Includes grapheme_double_free.rs reproduction test demonstrating that prior
to this fix, two releases of the same ID would corrupt the free list and
cause subsequent interns to receive duplicate slots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
